mapper.select: SELECT r.role_code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.permission IS NOT NULL AND m.permission != '' AND m.deleted = 0
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT r.role_name FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT id, username, nickname, password, phone, email, avatar, dept_id, position_id, tenant_id, account_type, status, last_login_time, last_login_ip, password_update_time, first_login, password_error_count, lock_time, phone_suffix, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND username = #{username} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, username, nickname, password, phone, email, avatar, dept_id, position_id, tenant_id, account_type, status, last_login_time, last_login_ip, password_update_time, first_login, password_error_count, lock_time, phone_suffix, create_time, update_time FROM sys_user WHERE id > #{lastId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{batchSize}
